codebase_patterns.async_database: Single aiosqlite connection per Database instance with explicit initialize/close lifecycle. Use parameterized queries for all SQL.
codebase_patterns.session_management: Active sessions tracked in-memory dict, updated on each trace, then persisted to SQLite.
codebase_patterns.mcp_protocol: Request/response matching using message_id stored in pending_requests dict.
codebase_patterns.token_estimation: len(text) // 4 heuristic - approximate, may differ from actual API counts by 10-30%.
codebase_patterns.settings_pattern: Module-level _settings variable with lazy initialization via get_settings().
codebase_patterns.migration_versioning: Sequential version numbers with schema_version table in SQLite.
codebase_patterns.web_dashboard: FastAPI web app on separate port (8766) from MCP server (8765). HTML dashboard served at / with auto-refresh.
codebase_patterns.file_structure: src/ contains mcp_server/, analytics/, dashboard/, storage/, config/, utils/ modules.

common_mistakes_to_avoid: Don't use executescript() with dynamic SQL - stick to parameterized execute()
Add message size limits before json.loads() on network input
Validate file paths in export functions against path traversal
Add bounds checking to in-memory dicts (active_sessions) to prevent unbounded growth
Use asyncio.Lock for shared state accessed from multiple async tasks (pending_requests)
Default host to 127.0.0.1, not 0.0.0.0 for security
Don't mix test/demo utilities with production code - keep in separate modules
